scenarios.title: APP action list sub-mode reports installed and running apps

turns.name: user-asks-list
turns.responseText:
are some common apps you might be interested in: - **Productivity**: Google Docs, Microsoft Office, Notion, Trello
- **Communication**: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, WhatsApp
- **Social Media**: Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn
- **Entertainment**: Netflix, Spotify, YouTube, Twitch
- **Utilities**: Evernote, Dropbox, Google Drive, 1Password If you have a specific category or need in mind, let me know and I can suggest more tailored options.
